mustPass: Includes a home route and a contact route.
Page set is adapted to manufacturing of electrical apparatus with dedicated products and manufacturing pages.
Every default route has a matching sectionsPerRoute entry.
Contact path is Swedish, lowercase and starts with '/'.
Recommended dossiers only use allowed dossier ids.
All routes from routes.json are present.
No lorem ipsum or sample placeholder copy.
Generated code typechecks and the project builds.
avoid: Generic local-service structure that lacks product or manufacturing information.
Invented certifications, standards compliance, production volumes or customer logos.
Vague service copy that does not explain what is manufactured.
Repeating the same trust claims on every page.
Using pricing tables for products that are typically quote-based or specification-dependent without real pricing data.
